---
title: "Notes"
author: "John Curtin"
---

# EDA

Need to improve data quality.   EDA needed.

# Models

train several algorithms including xgboost, random forest, and glmnet
Consider feature engineering for categorical variables with more than two levels.

- One hot
- target encoding

Consider multi-category classification and ordinal models

Need to scale features for glmnet

consider interactions among pref tone and style
consider interactions among tone and style (maybe why we see difference between sample mean best vs. model predicted best)


# Analyses

Need to get held out mean helpfulness for various assignment methods.  Can use same outer 6x5.  No need for inner if ussing all tones/styles or mean best tone/style.  Will use inner to tune prediction model

- use all tones/styles
- select based on best mean tone/style
- select based on predicted best tone/style
